content.speakerText: Hi there! Do you know where the action figures are?
content.speakerTextCn: 你好！你知道动作玩偶在哪儿吗？

options.text: I'm sorry, I don't work here.
Sure! They're down aisle 3, next to the dolls.

content.explanation: 正确答案是 'Sure! They're down aisle 3, next to the dolls.'，这是对询问位置的礼貌且直接的回应。其他选项要么回避问题，要么与情境无关。'I'm sorry, I don't work here.' 不礼貌且不必要；'You should ask the manager.' 推卸责任；'I don't like action figures.' 表达个人偏好，完全偏离问题。

content.speakerText: Thanks! And do you have any with batteries included?

options.text: I think they're on sale this week.
Most do! This one comes with 4 AA batteries.
Batteries are expensive, so I don't recommend buying them.
Can I help you find something else?

content.explanation: 正确答案是 'Most do! This one comes with 4 AA batteries.'，因为它直接回应了关于 'batteries included' 的关键询问。其他选项要么偏离主题（如促销信息），要么给出负面建议或转移话题，未回应顾客的核心需求。

content.speakerText: Good afternoon! Could you tell me where the building blocks are?
content.speakerTextCn: 下午好！你能告诉我积木在哪儿吗？

options.text: Of course! They're in aisle 2, next to the puzzles.

content.explanation: 正确答案是 'Of course! They're in aisle 2, next to the puzzles.'，这是礼貌且提供明确方向的回应，符合打招呼询问场景的规范。其他选项要么不礼貌（'I'm busy'），要么追问无必要信息（'Why do you need them?'），要么直接否认服务，不符合服务场景。
